name: Kokina Avga (Easter Eggs)
recipeInstructions:
One of the nicest Greek customs is the use of red eggs for the Easter celebration. It is unthinkable to set an Easter table without these eggs, as they add to the celebration and happy atmosphere.
To prepare:
1. Carefully wash and dry each egg.
2. Set a large pot of water to boil.
3. Add a red dye or food coloring and 3/4 cup of vinegar to the water, then bring to a boil.
4. Slowly lower the eggs into the pot. When the water comes to a boil again, reduce the heat.
5. Let the eggs simmer for 15 minutes.
6. Carefully remove the eggs from the pot using tongs or a slotted spoon.
7. If you plan to cook more eggs, add an additional 2 tablespoons of vinegar to the boiling water before repeating steps 3-6.
8. Wipe each cooked egg with a cotton ball soaked in vegetable oil.
9. Wipe the eggs dry with a clean cloth.
10. Place the eggs on a platter and serve cold.
